cases.scenario_csharp_body:
var cam = new Camera();
observables["orthographic_size"] = cam.orthographicSize;

var bc = new BoxCollider2D();
observables["size"] = new[] { bc.size.x, bc.size.y };

var cc = new CircleCollider2D();
observables["radius"] = cc.radius;

Debug.Log("parity-debug-message");
observables["ok"] = true;
observables["pi"] = Mathf.PI;

var hit = Physics2D.Raycast(new Vector2(0f, 0f), new Vector2(1f, 0f), 10f);
observables["distance"] = hit.distance;

var q = Quaternion.identity;
observables["q"] = new[] { q.x, q.y, q.z, q.w };

var go = new GameObject("t");
observables["active"] = go.activeSelf;

cases.case_name: GameObject.FindGameObjectsWithTag returns empty array when no match
cases.scenario_csharp_body:
var matches = GameObject.FindGameObjectsWithTag("NotARealTag");
observables["count"] = matches.Length;

cases.case_name: Input.GetAxis returns 0 when no input is bound
Input.GetKey returns false when no keyboard is bound
Input.GetKeyDown returns false when no keyboard is bound
cases.scenario_csharp_body:
observables["space"] = Input.GetKeyDown("space");
observables["a"] = Input.GetKeyDown("a");

cases.case_name: MonoBehaviour OnDisable / OnCollisionEnter2D / OnCollisionExit2D / OnCollisionStay2D / OnTriggerEnter2D / OnTriggerExit2D / OnTriggerStay2D dispatch

cases.scenario_csharp_body:
var rb = new Rigidbody2D();
observables["angular"] = rb.angularVelocity;

var rb = new Rigidbody2D();
observables["body_type"] = rb.bodyType.ToString().ToLower();

var rb = new Rigidbody2D();
observables["drag"] = rb.drag;

var rb = new Rigidbody2D();
observables["gravity_scale"] = rb.gravityScale;

var rb = new Rigidbody2D();
observables["mass"] = rb.mass;

var sr = new SpriteRenderer();
observables["sorting_order"] = sr.sortingOrder;
observables["delta_time"] = Time.deltaTime;
observables["fixed_delta_time"] = Time.fixedDeltaTime;
observables["frame_count"] = Time.frameCount;
observables["time_scale"] = Time.timeScale;

Time.timeScale = 0.0f;
observables["time_scale"] = Time.timeScale;

var go = new GameObject("t");
observables["count"] = go.transform.childCount;

cases.case_name: Transform.childCount: reparent decrements old, increments new
Transform.rotation setter round-trip preserves Quaternion components
